achievements.name: Hot Streak
achievements.description: Answer five questions correctly in a row.

achievements.name: Headliner
achievements.description: Reach round ten in a single run.

achievements.name: Encore
achievements.description: Clear a full round while on your last life.

achievements.name: Pitch Perfect
achievements.description: Finish a round without a single wrong answer.

achievements.name: After Hours
achievements.description: Finish a run between midnight and four in the morning.

achievements.name: Keep the Signal Warm
achievements.description: Recover every master tape and hear the whole story.
